topic.what: Orchestrating multiple LLM-powered agents in a four-module pipeline for automated vulnerability discovery
topic.how: Four-stage pipeline (Matcher/VulCoCo, Filter/R2Vul, Inspector/VulTrial, Adapter/PairVul) that progressively refines detection from candidate matching through structured reasoning to multi-agent deliberation and domain adaptation
topic.why_matters: Traditional SAST tools suffer high false positives causing developer alert fatigue; TitanCA discovered 118 CVEs and 203 zero-days across 127K+ GitHub repositories demonstrating practical utility

characteristics.what_it_measures: Confirmed vulnerability assignments from discovered zero-days
Total confirmed vulnerabilities identified in OSS
characteristics.context: All subsequently fixed by development teams

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of alerts incorrectly flagging safe code
characteristics.evidence: R2Vul calibration step reduces FPR from 28% to 20%
characteristics.context: Under balanced conditions; also achieves same FPR target under 1:10 class imbalance

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of actual vulnerabilities correctly identified
characteristics.evidence: Over 77% recall preserved while FPR reduced from 28% to 20%
characteristics.context: R2Vul calibration maintains recall under class imbalance

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of discovered vulnerabilities rated critical
characteristics.evidence: 35% of discovered vulnerabilities are critical severity
characteristics.context: 95% are at least medium severity; 91% exhibit low attack complexity

characteristics.evidence: OSS monitoring pipeline analyzed code from over 127,000 repositories
characteristics.context: Continuous monitoring infrastructure using 500TB data engineering

characteristics.what_it_measures: Likely vulnerability samples in training dataset
characteristics.evidence: Dataset contains over 342,000 likely vulnerability samples
characteristics.context: Built from NVD, TitanVul dataset (~40K samples), and synthetic generation

characteristics.what_it_measures: Per-function computational cost after pipeline reordering
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs initial parallel design with expensive Inspector upfront
characteristics.evidence: Reordering pipeline to run cheap filtering first reduced per-function cost substantially
characteristics.context: Lesson: push cheapest most selective operations to front like query optimization
